revision.comment: Performed minor cleanup on punctuation.
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | templatestyles = History of Japan/styles.css | class = history-of-japan | name = History of Japan | centered list titles = y | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:History of Japan|a series]] on the | title = [[History of Japan]] <!--Default image should fit for most of Japan's history, including pages of pre-Meiji periods--> | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage |image={{{image|KaiIchiranzu1806.jpg}}} |size={{{imagesize|250px}}} }} | caption = {{{caption|}}} | expanded = {{{expanded|{{{selected|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
<!-------------------------------- Periods ----------------------------------- Note: Events included in this list for a particular time period should be considered significant to Japan's overall history Insignificant events are discouraged. --> | list1name = periods | list1title = {{resize|110%|Periods}}<!--Resize here (rather than via styling) so accompanying [show/hide] link is not resized as well--> | list1 = {{aligned table|fullwidth=y|leftright=y|nowrap2=y |'''[[Japanese Paleolithic|Paleolithic]]''' |before 14,000 BC |'''[[Jōmon period|Jōmon]]''' |14,000–1000 BC<!-- ------ Note: The inclusion of the Yamato period below is a contentious issue. Please only include/edit it after discussion on the talk page.
|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Kofun period|Kofun]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |300–538 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Asuka period|Asuka]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |538–710 <!---------------------------------------------------------> |{{longitem |'''[[Nara period|Nara]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |710–794
|{{longitem |'''[[Heian period|Heian]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Former Nine Years' War]] |[[Later Three-Year War]] |[[Genpei War]] }} }} |794–1185
|{{longitem |'''[[Kamakura period|Kamakura]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Jōkyū War]]| |[[Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions]]| |[[Genkō War]]| |[[Kenmu Restoration]] }} }} |1185–1333
|{{longitem |'''[[Muromachi period|Muromachi]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Northern and Southern Courts period|Nanboku-chō period]] |[[Sengoku period]]}} }} |1336–1573
|{{longitem |'''[[Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Nanban trade]] |[[Japanese invasions of Korea (1592–1598)|Imjin War]] |[[Battle of Sekigahara]]}} }} |1573–1603
|{{longitem |[[Edo period|'''Edo''' {{small|(Tokugawa)}}]] {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Tokugawa shogunate]] |[[Invasion of Ryukyu]] |[[Siege of Osaka]] |[[Sakoku]] |[[Perry Expedition]] |[[Convention of Kanagawa]] |[[Bakumatsu]] |[[Meiji Restoration]] |[[Boshin War]]}} }} |1603–1868
|{{longitem |'''[[Meiji era|Meiji]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Ryūkyū Disposition]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1874)|Invasion of Taiwan (1874)]] |[[Satsuma Rebellion]] |[[First Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Shimonoseki]] |[[Triple Intervention]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Invasion of Taiwan (1895)]] |[[Taiwan under Japanese rule|Colonization of Taiwan]] |[[Boxer Rebellion|Boxer Rebellion]] |[[Russo-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Portsmouth|Treaty of Portsmouth]] |[[Japan–Korea Treaty of 1910|Japan–Korea Treaty]] |[[Korea under Japanese rule|Colonization of Korea]]}} }} |1868–1912
|{{longitem |'''[[Taishō era|Taishō]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Japan during World War I|World War I]] |[[Japanese intervention in Siberia|Intervention in Siberia]] |[[1923 Great Kantō earthquake|Great Kantō earthquake]]}} }} |1912–1926
|'''[[Shōwa era|Shōwa]]''' {{ublist |class=wraplinks |style=padding-left:1.4em;text-align:left;line-height:1.25em;padding-bottom:0.2em; |[[Japanese militarism|Militarism]] |[[Shōwa financial crisis|Financial crisis]] |[[Nanking incident of 1927|Nanking incident]] |[[Mukden Incident]] |[[Japanese invasion of Manchuria|Invasion of Manchuria]] |[[May 15 incident]] |[[February 26 incident]] |[[Anti-Comintern Pact]] |[[Tripartite Pact]] |[[Second Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Japan during World War II|World War II]] |[[Attack on Pearl Harbor]] |[[Pacific War]] |[[Atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki|Atomic bombings]] |[[Soviet–Japanese War]] |[[Surrender of Japan]] |[[Occupation of Japan]] |[[Postwar Japan]] |[[Anpo protests]] |[[Japanese economic miracle|Economic miracle]] |[[Japanese asset price bubble|Asset price bubble]]}} |1926–1989
|{{longitem |'''[[Heisei era|Heisei]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Lost Decades]] |[[Great Hanshin earthquake]] |[[Cool Japan]] |[[2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|Tōhoku earthquake]] |[[2019 Japanese imperial transition|Imperial transition]] }} }} |1989–2019
|{{longitem |'''[[Reiwa era|Reiwa]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[COVID-19 pandemic in Japan|COVID-19 pandemic]] |[[Assassination of Shinzo Abe|Abe assassination]] |[[2024 Noto earthquake|Noto earthquake]]}} }} |2019–present }}
<!--------------------------------- Topics ------------------------------------>
| list2name = topics | list2title = {{resize|110%|Topics}}<!--(see above)--> | list2 = <!--Alphabetical:--> {{startflatlist}} * [[Capital punishment in Japan#History|Capital punishment]] * [[Japanese currency|Currency]] * [[List of earthquakes in Japan|Earthquakes]] * [[Economic history of Japan|Economy]] * [[Japanese era name|Era names]] * [[History of education in Japan|Education]] * [[Empire of Japan|Empire]] * [[History of Japanese foreign relations|Foreign relations]] * [[Geography of Japan|Geography]] * [[Historiography of Japan|Historiography]] * Religion ** [[History of Buddhism in Japan|Buddhism]] ** [[History of Christianity in Japan|Christianity]] ** [[History of Islam in Japan|Islam]] ** [[History of the Jews in Japan|Judaism]] ** [[History of Shinto|Shinto]] * [[Military history of Japan|Military]] * [[Naval history of Japan|Naval]] * [[Politics of Japan|Politics]] * [[Post-war Japan|Post-war]] * [[History of science and technology in Japan|Science and technology]] * [[History of sports in Japan|Sports]] * [[List of World Heritage Sites in Japan|World Heritage Sites]] {{endflatlist}}
<!--------------------------------- below -------------------------------------> | belowclass = hlist | below = * [[Glossary of Japanese history|Glossary]] * [[History of Japan|History]] * [[Timeline of Japanese history|Timeline]]
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | templatestyles = History of Japan/styles.css | class = history-of-japan | name = History of Japan | centered list titles = y | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:History of Japan|a series]] on the | title = [[History of Japan]] <!--Default image should fit for most of Japan's history, including pages of pre-Meiji periods--> | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage |image={{{image|KaiIchiranzu1806.jpg}}} |size={{{imagesize|250px}}} }} | caption = {{{caption|}}} | expanded = {{{expanded|{{{selected|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
<!-------------------------------- Periods ----------------------------------- Note: Events included in this list for a particular time period should be considered significant to Japan's overall history Insignificant events are discouraged. --> | list1name = periods | list1title = {{resize|110%|Periods}}<!--Resize here (rather than via styling) so accompanying [show/hide] link is not resized as well--> | list1 = {{aligned table|fullwidth=y|leftright=y|nowrap2=y |'''[[Japanese Paleolithic|Paleolithic]]''' |before 14,000 BC |'''[[Jōmon period|Jōmon]]''' |14,000–1000 BC<!-- ------ Note: The inclusion of the Yamato period below is a contentious issue. Please only include/edit it after discussion on the talk page.
|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Kofun period|Kofun]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |300–538 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Asuka period|Asuka]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |538–710 <!---------------------------------------------------------> |{{longitem |'''[[Nara period|Nara]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |710–794
|{{longitem |'''[[Heian period|Heian]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Former Nine Years' War]] |[[Later Three-Year War]] |[[Genpei War]] }} }} |794–1185
|{{longitem |'''[[Kamakura period|Kamakura]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Jōkyū War]]| |[[Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions]]| |[[Genkō War]]| |[[Kenmu Restoration]] }} }} |1185–1333
|{{longitem |'''[[Muromachi period|Muromachi]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Northern and Southern Courts period|Nanboku-chō period]] |[[Sengoku period]]}} }} |1336–1573
|{{longitem |'''[[Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Nanban trade]] |[[Japanese invasions of Korea (1592–1598)|Imjin War]] |[[Battle of Sekigahara]]}} }} |1573–1603
|{{longitem |[[Edo period|'''Edo''' {{small|(Tokugawa)}}]] {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Tokugawa shogunate]] |[[Invasion of Ryukyu]] |[[Siege of Osaka]] |[[Sakoku]] |[[Perry Expedition]] |[[Convention of Kanagawa]] |[[Bakumatsu]] |[[Meiji Restoration]] |[[Boshin War]]}} }} |1603–1868
|{{longitem |'''[[Meiji era|Meiji]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Ryūkyū Disposition]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1874)|Invasion of Taiwan (1874)]] |[[Satsuma Rebellion]] |[[First Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Shimonoseki]] |[[Triple Intervention]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Invasion of Taiwan (1895)]] |[[Taiwan under Japanese rule|Colonization of Taiwan]] |[[Boxer Rebellion|Boxer Rebellion]] |[[Russo-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Portsmouth|Treaty of Portsmouth]] |[[Japan–Korea Treaty of 1910|Japan–Korea Treaty]] |[[Korea under Japanese rule|Colonization of Korea]]}} }} |1868–1912
|{{longitem |'''[[Taishō era|Taishō]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Japan during World War I|World War I]] |[[Japanese intervention in Siberia|Intervention in Siberia]] |[[1923 Great Kantō earthquake|Great Kantō earthquake]]}} }} |1912–1926
|'''[[Shōwa era|Shōwa]]''' {{ublist |class=wraplinks |style=padding-left:1.4em;text-align:left;line-height:1.25em;padding-bottom:0.2em; |[[Japanese militarism|Militarism]] |[[Shōwa financial crisis|Financial crisis]] |[[Nanking incident of 1927|Nanking incident]] |[[Mukden Incident]] |[[Japanese invasion of Manchuria|Invasion of Manchuria]] |[[May 15 incident]] |[[February 26 incident]] |[[Anti-Comintern Pact]] |[[Tripartite Pact]] |[[Second Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Japan during World War II|World War II]] |[[Attack on Pearl Harbor]] |[[Pacific War]] |[[Atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki|Atomic bombings]] |[[Soviet–Japanese War]] |[[Surrender of Japan]] |[[Occupation of Japan]] |[[Postwar Japan]] |[[Anpo protests]] |[[Japanese economic miracle|Economic miracle]] |[[Japanese asset price bubble|Asset price bubble]]}} |1926–1989
|{{longitem |'''[[Heisei era|Heisei]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Lost Decades]] |[[Great Hanshin earthquake]] |[[Cool Japan]] |[[2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|Tōhoku earthquake]] |[[2019 Japanese imperial transition|Imperial transition]] }} }} |1989–2019
|{{longitem |'''[[Reiwa era|Reiwa]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[COVID-19 pandemic in Japan|COVID-19 pandemic]] |[[Assassination of Shinzo Abe|Abe assassination]] |[[2024 Noto earthquake|Noto earthquake]]}} }} |2019–present }}
<!--------------------------------- Topics ------------------------------------>
| list2name = topics | list2title = {{resize|110%|Topics}}<!--(see above)--> | list2 = <!--Alphabetical:--> {{startflatlist}} * [[Capital punishment in Japan#History|Capital punishment]] * [[Japanese currency|Currency]] * [[List of earthquakes in Japan|Earthquakes]] * [[Economic history of Japan|Economy]] * [[Japanese era name|Era names]] * [[History of education in Japan|Education]] * [[Empire of Japan|Empire]] * [[History of Japanese foreign relations|Foreign relations]] * [[Geography of Japan|Geography]] * [[Historiography of Japan|Historiography]] * Religion ** [[History of Buddhism in Japan|Buddhism]] ** [[History of Christianity in Japan|Christianity]] ** [[History of Islam in Japan|Islam]] ** [[History of the Jews in Japan|Judaism]] ** [[History of Shinto|Shinto]] * [[Military history of Japan|Military]] * [[Naval history of Japan|Naval]] * [[Politics of Japan|Politics]] * [[Post-war Japan|Post-war]] * [[History of science and technology in Japan|Science and technology]] * [[History of sports in Japan|Sports]] * [[List of World Heritage Sites in Japan|World Heritage Sites]] {{endflatlist}}
<!--------------------------------- below -------------------------------------> | belowclass = hlist | below = * [[Glossary of Japanese history|Glossary]] * [[History of Japan|History]] * [[Timeline of Japanese history|Timeline]]
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

|{{longitem |'''[[Heisei era|Heisei]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Lost Decades]] |[[Great Hanshin earthquake]] |[[Cool Japan]] |[[2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|Tōhoku earthquake]] |[[2019 Japanese imperial transition|Imperial transition]] }} }} |1989–2019

revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | templatestyles = History of Japan/styles.css | class = history-of-japan | name = History of Japan | centered list titles = y | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:History of Japan|a series]] on the | title = [[History of Japan]] <!--Default image should fit for most of Japan's history, including pages of pre-Meiji periods--> | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage |image={{{image|KaiIchiranzu1806.jpg}}} |size={{{imagesize|250px}}} }} | caption = {{{caption|}}} | expanded = {{{expanded|{{{selected|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
<!-------------------------------- Periods ----------------------------------- Note: Events included in this list for a particular time period should be considered significant to Japan's overall history Insignificant events are discouraged. --> | list1name = periods | list1title = {{resize|110%|Periods}}<!--Resize here (rather than via styling) so accompanying [show/hide] link is not resized as well--> | list1 = {{aligned table|fullwidth=y|leftright=y|nowrap2=y |'''[[Japanese Paleolithic|Paleolithic]]''' |before 14,000 BC |'''[[Jōmon period|Jōmon]]''' |14,000–1000 BC<!-- ------ Note: The inclusion of the Yamato period below is a contentious issue. Please only include/edit it after discussion on the talk page.
|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Kofun period|Kofun]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |300–538 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Asuka period|Asuka]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |538–710 <!---------------------------------------------------------> |{{longitem |'''[[Nara period|Nara]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |710–794
|{{longitem |'''[[Heian period|Heian]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Former Nine Years' War]] |[[Later Three-Year War]] |[[Genpei War]] }} }} |794–1185
|{{longitem |'''[[Kamakura period|Kamakura]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Jōkyū War]]| |[[Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions]]| |[[Genkō War]]| |[[Kenmu Restoration]] }} }} |1185–1333
|{{longitem |'''[[Muromachi period|Muromachi]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Northern and Southern Courts period|Nanboku-chō period]] |[[Sengoku period]]}} }} |1336–1573
|{{longitem |'''[[Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Nanban trade]] |[[Japanese invasions of Korea (1592–1598)|Imjin War]] |[[Battle of Sekigahara]]}} }} |1573–1603
|{{longitem |[[Edo period|'''Edo''' {{small|(Tokugawa)}}]] {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Tokugawa shogunate]] |[[Invasion of Ryukyu]] |[[Siege of Osaka]] |[[Sakoku]] |[[Perry Expedition]] |[[Convention of Kanagawa]] |[[Bakumatsu]] |[[Meiji Restoration]] |[[Boshin War]]}} }} |1603–1868
|{{longitem |'''[[Meiji era|Meiji]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Ryūkyū Disposition]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1874)|Invasion of Taiwan (1874)]] |[[Satsuma Rebellion]] |[[First Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Shimonoseki]] |[[Triple Intervention]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Invasion of Taiwan (1895)]] |[[Taiwan under Japanese rule|Colonization of Taiwan]] |[[Boxer Rebellion|Boxer Rebellion]] |[[Russo-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Portsmouth|Treaty of Portsmouth]] |[[Japan–Korea Treaty of 1910|Japan–Korea Treaty]] |[[Korea under Japanese rule|Colonization of Korea]]}} }} |1868–1912
|{{longitem |'''[[Taishō era|Taishō]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Japan during World War I|World War I]] |[[Japanese intervention in Siberia|Intervention in Siberia]] |[[1923 Great Kantō earthquake|Great Kantō earthquake]]}} }} |1912–1926
|'''[[Shōwa era|Shōwa]]''' {{ublist |class=wraplinks |style=padding-left:1.4em;text-align:left;line-height:1.25em;padding-bottom:0.2em; |[[Japanese militarism|Militarism]] |[[Shōwa financial crisis|Financial crisis]] |[[Nanking incident of 1927|Nanking incident]] |[[Mukden Incident]] |[[Japanese invasion of Manchuria|Invasion of Manchuria]] |[[May 15 incident]] |[[February 26 incident]] |[[Anti-Comintern Pact]] |[[Tripartite Pact]] |[[Second Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Japan during World War II|World War II]] |[[Attack on Pearl Harbor]] |[[Pacific War]] |[[Atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki|Atomic bombings]] |[[Soviet–Japanese War]] |[[Surrender of Japan]] |[[Occupation of Japan]] |[[Postwar Japan]] |[[Anpo protests]] |[[Japanese economic miracle|Economic miracle]] |[[Japanese asset price bubble|Asset price bubble]]}} |1926–1989
|{{longitem |'''[[Heisei era|Heisei]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Lost Decades]] |[[Great Hanshin earthquake]] |[[Cool Japan]] |[[2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|Tōhoku earthquake]] |[[2019 Japanese imperial transition|Imperial transition]] }} }} |1989–2019
|{{longitem |'''[[Reiwa era|Reiwa]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[COVID-19 pandemic in Japan|COVID-19 pandemic]] |[[Assassination of Shinzo Abe|Abe assassination]] |[[2024 Noto earthquake|Noto earthquake]]}} }} |2019–present }}

revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | templatestyles = History of Japan/styles.css | class = history-of-japan | name = History of Japan | centered list titles = y | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:History of Japan|a series]] on the | title = [[History of Japan]] <!--Default image should fit for most of Japan's history, including pages of pre-Meiji periods--> | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage |image={{{image|KaiIchiranzu1806.jpg}}} |size={{{imagesize|250px}}} }} | caption = {{{caption|}}} | expanded = {{{expanded|{{{selected|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
<!-------------------------------- Periods ----------------------------------- Note: Events included in this list for a particular time period should be considered significant to Japan's overall history Insignificant events are discouraged. --> | list1name = periods | list1title = {{resize|110%|Periods}}<!--Resize here (rather than via styling) so accompanying [show/hide] link is not resized as well--> | list1 = {{aligned table|fullwidth=y|leftright=y|nowrap2=y |'''[[Japanese Paleolithic|Paleolithic]]''' |before 14,000 BC |'''[[Jōmon period|Jōmon]]''' |14,000–1000 BC<!-- ------ Note: The inclusion of the Yamato period below is a contentious issue. Please only include/edit it after discussion on the talk page.
|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Kofun period|Kofun]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |300–538 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Asuka period|Asuka]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |538–710 <!---------------------------------------------------------> |{{longitem |'''[[Nara period|Nara]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |710–794
|{{longitem |'''[[Heian period|Heian]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Former Nine Years' War]] |[[Later Three-Year War]] |[[Genpei War]] }} }} |794–1185
|{{longitem |'''[[Kamakura period|Kamakura]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Jōkyū War]]| |[[Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions]]| |[[Genkō War]]| |[[Kenmu Restoration]] }} }} |1185–1333
|{{longitem |'''[[Muromachi period|Muromachi]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Northern and Southern Courts period|Nanboku-chō period]] |[[Sengoku period]]}} }} |1336–1573
|{{longitem |'''[[Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Nanban trade]] |[[Japanese invasions of Korea (1592–1598)|Imjin War]] |[[Battle of Sekigahara]]}} }} |1573–1603
|{{longitem |[[Edo period|'''Edo''' {{small|(Tokugawa)}}]] {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Tokugawa shogunate]] |[[Invasion of Ryukyu]] |[[Siege of Osaka]] |[[Sakoku]] |[[Perry Expedition]] |[[Convention of Kanagawa]] |[[Bakumatsu]] |[[Meiji Restoration]] |[[Boshin War]]}} }} |1603–1868
|{{longitem |'''[[Meiji era|Meiji]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Ryūkyū Disposition]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1874)|Invasion of Taiwan (1874)]] |[[Satsuma Rebellion]] |[[First Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Shimonoseki]] |[[Triple Intervention]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Invasion of Taiwan (1895)]] |[[Taiwan under Japanese rule|Colonization of Taiwan]] |[[Boxer Rebellion|Boxer Rebellion]] |[[Russo-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Portsmouth|Treaty of Portsmouth]] |[[Japan–Korea Treaty of 1910|Japan–Korea Treaty]] |[[Korea under Japanese rule|Colonization of Korea]]}} }} |1868–1912
|{{longitem |'''[[Taishō era|Taishō]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Japan during World War I|World War I]] |[[Japanese intervention in Siberia|Intervention in Siberia]] |[[1923 Great Kantō earthquake|Great Kantō earthquake]]}} }} |1912–1926
|'''[[Shōwa era|Shōwa]]''' {{ublist |class=wraplinks |style=padding-left:1.4em;text-align:left;line-height:1.25em;padding-bottom:0.2em; |[[Japanese militarism|Militarism]] |[[Shōwa financial crisis|Financial crisis]] |[[Nanking incident of 1927|Nanking incident]] |[[Mukden Incident]] |[[Japanese invasion of Manchuria|Invasion of Manchuria]] |[[May 15 incident]] |[[February 26 incident]] |[[Anti-Comintern Pact]] |[[Tripartite Pact]] |[[Second Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Japan during World War II|World War II]] |[[Attack on Pearl Harbor]] |[[Pacific War]] |[[Atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki|Atomic bombings]] |[[Soviet–Japanese War]] |[[Surrender of Japan]] |[[Occupation of Japan]] |[[Postwar Japan]] |[[Anpo protests]] |[[Japanese economic miracle|Economic miracle]] |[[Japanese asset price bubble|Asset price bubble]]}} |1926–1989
|{{longitem |'''[[Heisei era|Heisei]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Lost Decades]] |[[Great Hanshin earthquake]] |[[Cool Japan]] |[[2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|Tōhoku earthquake]] |[[2019 Japanese imperial transition|Imperial transition]] }} }} |1989–2019
|{{longitem |'''[[Reiwa era|Reiwa]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[COVID-19 pandemic in Japan|COVID-19 pandemic]] |[[Assassination of Shinzo Abe|Abe assassination]] |[[2024 Noto earthquake|Noto earthquake]]}} }} |2019–present }}
<!--------------------------------- Topics ------------------------------------>
| list2name = topics | list2title = {{resize|110%|Topics}}<!--(see above)--> | list2 = <!--Alphabetical:--> {{startflatlist}} * [[Capital punishment in Japan#History|Capital punishment]] * [[Japanese currency|Currency]] * [[List of earthquakes in Japan|Earthquakes]] * [[Economic history of Japan|Economy]] * [[Japanese era name|Era names]] * [[History of education in Japan|Education]] * [[Empire of Japan|Empire]] * [[History of Japanese foreign relations|Foreign relations]] * [[Geography of Japan|Geography]] * [[Historiography of Japan|Historiography]] * Religion ** [[History of Buddhism in Japan|Buddhism]] ** [[History of Christianity in Japan|Christianity]] ** [[History of Islam in Japan|Islam]] ** [[History of the Jews in Japan|Judaism]] ** [[History of Shinto|Shinto]] * [[Military history of Japan|Military]] * [[Naval history of Japan|Naval]] * [[Politics of Japan|Politics]] * [[Post-war Japan|Post-war]] * [[History of science and technology in Japan|Science and technology]] * [[History of sports in Japan|Sports]] * [[List of World Heritage Sites in Japan|World Heritage Sites]] {{endflatlist}}
<!--------------------------------- below -------------------------------------> | belowclass = hlist | below = * [[Glossary of Japanese history|Glossary]] * [[History of Japan|History]] * [[Timeline of Japanese history|Timeline]]
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

|{{longitem |'''[[Meiji era|Meiji]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Ryūkyū Disposition]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1874)|Invasion of Taiwan (1874)]] |[[Satsuma Rebellion]] |[[First Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Shimonoseki]] |[[Triple Intervention]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Invasion of Taiwan (1895)]] |[[Taiwan under Japanese rule|Colonization of Taiwan]] |[[Boxer Rebellion|Boxer Rebellion]] |[[Russo-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Portsmouth|Treaty of Portsmouth]] |[[Japan–Korea Treaty of 1910|Japan–Korea Treaty]] |[[Korea under Japanese rule|Colonization of Korea]]}} }} |1868–1912

<!-------------------------------- Periods ----------------------------------- Note: Events included in this list for a particular time period should be considered significant to Japan's overall history Insignificant events are discouraged. --> | list1name = periods | list1title = {{resize|110%|Periods}}<!--Resize here (rather than via styling) so accompanying [show/hide] link is not resized as well--> | list1 = {{aligned table|fullwidth=y|leftright=y|nowrap2=y |'''[[Japanese Paleolithic|Paleolithic]]''' |before 14,000 BC |'''[[Jōmon period|Jōmon]]''' |14,000–1000 BC<!-- ------ Note: The inclusion of the Yamato period below is a contentious issue. Please only include/edit it after discussion on the talk page.
|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Kofun period|Kofun]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |300–538 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Asuka period|Asuka]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |538–710 <!---------------------------------------------------------> |{{longitem |'''[[Nara period|Nara]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |710–794
|{{longitem |'''[[Heian period|Heian]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Former Nine Years' War]] |[[Later Three-Year War]] |[[Genpei War]] }} }} |794–1185
|{{longitem |'''[[Kamakura period|Kamakura]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Jōkyū War]]| |[[Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions]]| |[[Genkō War]]| |[[Kenmu Restoration]] }} }} |1185–1333
|{{longitem |'''[[Muromachi period|Muromachi]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Northern and Southern Courts period|Nanboku-chō period]] |[[Sengoku period]]}} }} |1336–1573
|{{longitem |'''[[Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Nanban trade]] |[[Japanese invasions of Korea (1592–1598)|Imjin War]] |[[Battle of Sekigahara]]}} }} |1573–1603
|{{longitem |[[Edo period|'''Edo''' {{small|(Tokugawa)}}]] {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Tokugawa shogunate]] |[[Invasion of Ryukyu]] |[[Siege of Osaka]] |[[Sakoku]] |[[Perry Expedition]] |[[Convention of Kanagawa]] |[[:en:Bakumatsu|Bakumatsu]] |[[Meiji Restoration]] |[[Boshin War]]}} }} |1603–1868
|{{longitem |'''[[Meiji era|Meiji]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Ryūkyū Disposition]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1874)|Invasion of Taiwan (1874)]] |[[Satsuma Rebellion]] |[[First Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Shimonoseki]] |[[Triple Intervention]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Invasion of Taiwan (1895)]] |[[Taiwan under Japanese rule|Colonization of Taiwan]] |[[Boxer Rebellion|Boxer Rebellion]] |[[Russo-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Portsmouth|Treaty of Portsmouth]] |[[Japan–Korea Treaty of 1910|Japan–Korea Treaty]] |[[Korea under Japanese rule|Colonization of Korea]]}} }} |1868–1912
|{{longitem |'''[[Taishō era|Taishō]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Japan during World War I|World War I]] |[[Japanese intervention in Siberia|Intervention in Siberia]] |[[1923 Great Kantō earthquake|Great Kantō earthquake]]}} }} |1912–1926
|'''[[Shōwa era|Shōwa]]''' {{ublist |class=wraplinks |style=padding-left:1.4em;text-align:left;line-height:1.25em;padding-bottom:0.2em; |[[Japanese militarism|Militarism]] |[[Shōwa financial crisis|Financial crisis]] |[[Nanking incident of 1927|Nanking incident]] |[[Mukden Incident]] |[[Japanese invasion of Manchuria|Invasion of Manchuria]] |[[May 15 incident]] |[[February 26 incident]] |[[Anti-Comintern Pact]] |[[Tripartite Pact]] |[[Second Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Japan during World War II|World War II]] |[[Attack on Pearl Harbor]] |[[Pacific War]] |[[Atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki|Atomic bombings]] |[[Soviet–Japanese War]] |[[Surrender of Japan]] |[[Occupation of Japan]] |[[Postwar Japan]] |[[:en:Anpo protests|Anpo protests]] |[[Japanese economic miracle|Economic miracle]] |[[Japanese asset price bubble|Asset price bubble]]}} |1926–1989
|{{longitem |'''[[Heisei era|Heisei]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Lost Decades]] |[[Great Hanshin earthquake]] |[[Cool Japan]] |[[2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|Tōhoku earthquake]] |[[2019 Japanese imperial transition|Imperial transition]] }} }} |1989–2019
|{{longitem |'''[[Reiwa era|Reiwa]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:COVID-19 pandemic in Japan|COVID-19 pandemic]] |[[Assassination of Shinzo Abe|Abe assassination]] |[[2024 Noto earthquake|Noto earthquake]]}} }} |2019–present }}
<!--------------------------------- Topics ------------------------------------>
| list2name = topics | list2title = {{resize|110%|Topics}}<!--(see above)--> | list2 = <!--Alphabetical:--> {{startflatlist}} * [[Capital punishment in Japan#History|Capital punishment]] * [[Japanese currency|Currency]] * [[List of earthquakes in Japan|Earthquakes]] * [[Economic history of Japan|Economy]] * [[Japanese era name|Era names]] * [[History of education in Japan|Education]] * [[Empire of Japan|Empire]] * [[History of Japanese foreign relations|Foreign relations]] * [[Geography of Japan|Geography]] * [[Historiography of Japan|Historiography]] * Religion ** [[History of Buddhism in Japan|Buddhism]] ** [[History of Christianity in Japan|Christianity]] ** [[History of Islam in Japan|Islam]] ** [[History of the Jews in Japan|Judaism]] ** [[History of Shinto|Shinto]] * [[Military history of Japan|Military]] * [[Naval history of Japan|Naval]] * [[Politics of Japan|Politics]] * [[Post-war Japan|Post-war]] * [[History of science and technology in Japan|Science and technology]] * [[History of sports in Japan|Sports]] * [[List of World Heritage Sites in Japan|World Heritage Sites]] {{endflatlist}}
<!--------------------------------- below -------------------------------------> | belowclass = hlist | below = * [[Glossary of Japanese history|Glossary]] * [[History of Japan|History]] * [[Timeline of Japanese history|Timeline]]
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | templatestyles = History of Japan/styles.css | class = history-of-japan | name = History of Japan | centered list titles = y | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:History of Japan|a series]] on the | title = [[History of Japan]] <!--Default image should fit for most of Japan's history, including pages of pre-Meiji periods--> | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage |image={{{image|KaiIchiranzu1806.jpg}}} |size={{{imagesize|250px}}} }} | caption = {{{caption|}}} | expanded = {{{expanded|{{{selected|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}

Please only include/edit it after discussion on the talk page.
|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD

|{{longitem |'''[[Asuka period|Asuka]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |538–710 <!---------------------------------------------------------> |{{longitem |'''[[Nara period|Nara]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |710–794
|{{longitem |'''[[Heian period|Heian]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Former Nine Years' War]] |[[Later Three-Year War]] |[[Genpei War]] }} }} |794–1185

|{{longitem |'''[[Muromachi period|Muromachi]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Northern and Southern Courts period|Nanboku-chō period]] |[[Sengoku period]]}} }} |1336–1573
|{{longitem |'''[[Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Nanban trade]] |[[Japanese invasions of Korea (1592–1598)|Imjin War]] |[[Battle of Sekigahara]]}} }} |1573–1603
|{{longitem |[[Edo period|'''Edo''' {{small|(Tokugawa)}}]] {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Tokugawa shogunate]] |[[Invasion of Ryukyu]] |[[Siege of Osaka]] |[[Sakoku]] |[[Perry Expedition]] |[[Convention of Kanagawa]] |[[:en:Bakumatsu|Bakumatsu]] |[[Meiji Restoration]] |[[Boshin War]]}} }} |1603–1868
|{{longitem |'''[[Meiji era|Meiji]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Ryūkyū Disposition]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1874)|Invasion of Taiwan (1874)]] |[[Satsuma Rebellion]] |[[First Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Shimonoseki]] |[[Triple Intervention]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Invasion of Taiwan (1895)]] |[[Taiwan under Japanese rule|Colonization of Taiwan]] |[[Boxer Rebellion|Boxer Rebellion]] |[[Russo-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Portsmouth|Treaty of Portsmouth]] |[[Japan–Korea Treaty of 1910|Japan–Korea Treaty]] |[[Korea under Japanese rule|Colonization of Korea]]}} }} |1868–1912
|{{longitem |'''[[Taishō era|Taishō]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Japan during World War I|World War I]] |[[Japanese intervention in Siberia|Intervention in Siberia]] |[[1923 Great Kantō earthquake|Great Kantō earthquake]]}} }} |1912–1926
|'''[[Shōwa era|Shōwa]]''' {{ublist |class=wraplinks |style=padding-left:1.4em;text-align:left;line-height:1.25em;padding-bottom:0.2em; |[[Japanese militarism|Militarism]] |[[Shōwa financial crisis|Financial crisis]] |[[Nanking incident of 1927|Nanking incident]] |[[Mukden Incident]] |[[Japanese invasion of Manchuria|Invasion of Manchuria]] |[[May 15 incident]] |[[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] |[[Anti-Comintern Pact]] |[[Tripartite Pact]] |[[Second Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Japan during World War II|World War II]] |[[Attack on Pearl Harbor]] |[[Pacific War]] |[[Atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki|Atomic bombings]] |[[Soviet–Japanese War]] |[[Surrender of Japan]] |[[Occupation of Japan]] |[[Postwar Japan]] |[[:en:Anpo protests|Anpo protests]] |[[Japanese economic miracle|Economic miracle]] |[[Japanese asset price bubble|Asset price bubble]]}} |1926–1989
|{{longitem |'''[[Heisei era|Heisei]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Lost Decades]] |[[Great Hanshin earthquake]] |[[Cool Japan]] |[[2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|Tōhoku earthquake]] |[[2019 Japanese imperial transition|Imperial transition]] }} }} |1989–2019
|{{longitem |'''[[Reiwa era|Reiwa]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:COVID-19 pandemic in Japan|COVID-19 pandemic]] |[[Assassination of Shinzo Abe|Abe assassination]] |[[2024 Noto earthquake|Noto earthquake]]}} }} |2019–present }}
<!--------------------------------- Topics ------------------------------------>
| list2name = topics | list2title = {{resize|110%|Topics}}<!--(see above)--> | list2 = <!--Alphabetical:--> {{startflatlist}} * [[Capital punishment in Japan#History|Capital punishment]] * [[Japanese currency|Currency]] * [[List of earthquakes in Japan|Earthquakes]] * [[Economic history of Japan|Economy]] * [[Japanese era name|Era names]] * [[History of education in Japan|Education]] * [[Empire of Japan|Empire]] * [[History of Japanese foreign relations|Foreign relations]] * [[Geography of Japan|Geography]] * [[Historiography of Japan|Historiography]] * Religion ** [[History of Buddhism in Japan|Buddhism]] ** [[History of Christianity in Japan|Christianity]] ** [[History of Islam in Japan|Islam]] ** [[History of the Jews in Japan|Judaism]] ** [[History of Shinto|Shinto]] * [[Military history of Japan|Military]] * [[Naval history of Japan|Naval]] * [[Politics of Japan|Politics]] * [[Post-war Japan|Post-war]] * [[History of science and technology in Japan|Science and technology]] * [[History of sports in Japan|Sports]] * [[List of World Heritage Sites in Japan|World Heritage Sites]] {{endflatlist}}

}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

<!-------------------------------- Periods ----------------------------------- Note: Events included in this list for a particular time period should be considered significant to Japan's overall history Insignificant events are discouraged. --> | list1name = periods | list1title = {{resize|110%|Periods}}<!--Resize here (rather than via styling) so accompanying [show/hide] link is not resized as well--> | list1 = {{aligned table|fullwidth=y|leftright=y|nowrap2=y |'''[[Japanese Paleolithic|Paleolithic]]''' |before 14,000 BC |'''[[Jōmon period|Jōmon]]''' |14,000–1000 BC<!-- ------ Note: The inclusion of the Yamato period below is a contentious issue. Please only include/edit it after discussion on the talk page.
|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Kofun period|Kofun]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |300–538 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |538–710 <!---------------------------------------------------------> |{{longitem |'''[[Nara period|Nara]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |710–794
|{{longitem |'''[[Heian period|Heian]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Former Nine Years' War]] |[[Later Three-Year War]] |[[Genpei War]] }} }} |794–1185
|{{longitem |'''[[Kamakura period|Kamakura]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Jōkyū War]]| |[[Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions]]| |[[Genkō War]]| |[[Kenmu Restoration]] }} }} |1185–1333
|{{longitem |'''[[Muromachi period|Muromachi]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Northern and Southern Courts period|Nanboku-chō period]] |[[Sengoku period]]}} }} |1336–1573
|{{longitem |'''[[Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Nanban trade]] |[[Japanese invasions of Korea (1592–1598)|Imjin War]] |[[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]]}} }} |1573–1603
|{{longitem |[[:en:Edo period|'''Edo''' {{small|(Tokugawa)}}]] {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Tokugawa shogunate]] |[[Invasion of Ryukyu]] |[[Siege of Osaka]] |[[Sakoku]] |[[Perry Expedition]] |[[Convention of Kanagawa]] |[[:en:Bakumatsu|Bakumatsu]] |[[Meiji Restoration]] |[[Boshin War]]}} }} |1603–1868
|{{longitem |'''[[Meiji era|Meiji]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Ryūkyū Disposition]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1874)|Invasion of Taiwan (1874)]] |[[Satsuma Rebellion]] |[[:en:First Sino-Japanese War|First Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Shimonoseki]] |[[Triple Intervention]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Invasion of Taiwan (1895)]] |[[Taiwan under Japanese rule|Colonization of Taiwan]] |[[Boxer Rebellion|Boxer Rebellion]] |[[Russo-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Portsmouth|Treaty of Portsmouth]] |[[Japan–Korea Treaty of 1910|Japan–Korea Treaty]] |[[Korea under Japanese rule|Colonization of Korea]]}} }} |1868–1912
|{{longitem |'''[[Taishō era|Taishō]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Japan during World War I|World War I]] |[[Japanese intervention in Siberia|Intervention in Siberia]] |[[1923 Great Kantō earthquake|Great Kantō earthquake]]}} }} |1912–1926
|'''[[Shōwa era|Shōwa]]''' {{ublist |class=wraplinks |style=padding-left:1.4em;text-align:left;line-height:1.25em;padding-bottom:0.2em; |[[Japanese militarism|Militarism]] |[[Shōwa financial crisis|Financial crisis]] |[[Nanking incident of 1927|Nanking incident]] |[[Mukden Incident]] |[[Japanese invasion of Manchuria|Invasion of Manchuria]] |[[May 15 incident]] |[[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] |[[Anti-Comintern Pact]] |[[Tripartite Pact]] |[[Second Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Japan during World War II|World War II]] |[[Attack on Pearl Harbor]] |[[Pacific War]] |[[Atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki|Atomic bombings]] |[[Soviet–Japanese War]] |[[Surrender of Japan]] |[[Occupation of Japan]] |[[Postwar Japan]] |[[:en:Anpo protests|Anpo protests]] |[[Japanese economic miracle|Economic miracle]] |[[Japanese asset price bubble|Asset price bubble]]}} |1926–1989
|{{longitem |'''[[Heisei era|Heisei]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Lost Decades]] |[[Great Hanshin earthquake]] |[[Cool Japan]] |[[2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|Tōhoku earthquake]] |[[2019 Japanese imperial transition|Imperial transition]] }} }} |1989–2019
|{{longitem |'''[[Reiwa era|Reiwa]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:COVID-19 pandemic in Japan|COVID-19 pandemic]] |[[:en:Assassination of Shinzo Abe|Abe assassination]] |[[2024 Noto earthquake|Noto earthquake]]}} }} |2019–present }}
<!--------------------------------- Topics ------------------------------------>
| list2name = topics | list2title = {{resize|110%|Topics}}<!--(see above)--> | list2 = <!--Alphabetical:--> {{startflatlist}} * [[Capital punishment in Japan#History|Capital punishment]] * [[Japanese currency|Currency]] * [[List of earthquakes in Japan|Earthquakes]] * [[:en:Economic history of Japan|Economy]] * [[Japanese era name|Era names]] * [[History of education in Japan|Education]] * [[Empire of Japan|Empire]] * [[History of Japanese foreign relations|Foreign relations]] * [[Geography of Japan|Geography]] * [[Historiography of Japan|Historiography]] * Religion ** [[History of Buddhism in Japan|Buddhism]] ** [[History of Christianity in Japan|Christianity]] ** [[History of Islam in Japan|Islam]] ** [[History of the Jews in Japan|Judaism]] ** [[History of Shinto|Shinto]] * [[Military history of Japan|Military]] * [[Naval history of Japan|Naval]] * [[Politics of Japan|Politics]] * [[Post-war Japan|Post-war]] * [[History of science and technology in Japan|Science and technology]] * [[History of sports in Japan|Sports]] * [[List of World Heritage Sites in Japan|World Heritage Sites]] {{endflatlist}}
<!--------------------------------- below -------------------------------------> | belowclass = hlist | below = * [[Glossary of Japanese history|Glossary]] * [[History of Japan|History]] * [[Timeline of Japanese history|Timeline]]
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD

|{{longitem |'''[[Meiji era|Meiji]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Ryūkyū Disposition]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1874)|Invasion of Taiwan (1874)]] |[[Satsuma Rebellion]] |[[:en:First Sino-Japanese War|First Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Shimonoseki]] |[[Triple Intervention]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Invasion of Taiwan (1895)]] |[[Taiwan under Japanese rule|Colonization of Taiwan]] |[[Boxer Rebellion|Boxer Rebellion]] |[[Russo-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Portsmouth|Treaty of Portsmouth]] |[[Japan–Korea Treaty of 1910|Japan–Korea Treaty]] |[[Korea under Japanese rule|Colonization of Korea]]}} }} |1868–1912
|{{longitem |'''[[Taishō era|Taishō]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Japan during World War I|World War I]] |[[Japanese intervention in Siberia|Intervention in Siberia]] |[[1923 Great Kantō earthquake|Great Kantō earthquake]]}} }} |1912–1926

|{{longitem |'''[[Heisei era|Heisei]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Lost Decades]] |[[Great Hanshin earthquake]] |[[Cool Japan]] |[[2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|Tōhoku earthquake]] |[[2019 Japanese imperial transition|Imperial transition]] }} }} |1989–2019

Please only include/edit it after discussion on the talk page.
|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Kofun period|Kofun]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |300–538 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |538–710 <!---------------------------------------------------------> |{{longitem |'''[[Nara period|Nara]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |710–794

|{{longitem |'''[[Muromachi period|Muromachi]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Northern and Southern Courts period|Nanboku-chō period]] |[[Sengoku period]]}} }} |1336–1573
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Nanban trade]] |[[Japanese invasions of Korea (1592–1598)|Imjin War]] |[[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]]}} }} |1573–1603
|{{longitem |[[:en:Edo period|'''Edo''' {{small|(Tokugawa)}}]] {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Tokugawa shogunate]] |[[Invasion of Ryukyu]] |[[Siege of Osaka]] |[[Sakoku]] |[[Perry Expedition]] |[[:en:Convention of Kanagawa|Convention of Kanagawa]] |[[:en:Bakumatsu|Bakumatsu]] |[[Meiji Restoration]] |[[:en:Boshin War|Boshin War]]}} }} |1603–1868
|{{longitem |'''[[Meiji era|Meiji]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Ryūkyū Disposition]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1874)|Invasion of Taiwan (1874)]] |[[Satsuma Rebellion]] |[[:en:First Sino-Japanese War|First Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Shimonoseki]] |[[Triple Intervention]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Invasion of Taiwan (1895)]] |[[Taiwan under Japanese rule|Colonization of Taiwan]] |[[:en:Boxer Rebellion|Boxer Rebellion]] |[[Russo-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Portsmouth|Treaty of Portsmouth]] |[[Japan–Korea Treaty of 1910|Japan–Korea Treaty]] |[[Korea under Japanese rule|Colonization of Korea]]}} }} |1868–1912
|{{longitem |'''[[Taishō era|Taishō]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Japan during World War I|World War I]] |[[Japanese intervention in Siberia|Intervention in Siberia]] |[[1923 Great Kantō earthquake|Great Kantō earthquake]]}} }} |1912–1926
|'''[[Shōwa era|Shōwa]]''' {{ublist |class=wraplinks |style=padding-left:1.4em;text-align:left;line-height:1.25em;padding-bottom:0.2em; |[[Japanese militarism|Militarism]] |[[Shōwa financial crisis|Financial crisis]] |[[Nanking incident of 1927|Nanking incident]] |[[Mukden Incident]] |[[Japanese invasion of Manchuria|Invasion of Manchuria]] |[[May 15 incident]] |[[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] |[[Anti-Comintern Pact]] |[[Tripartite Pact]] |[[Second Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Japan during World War II|World War II]] |[[:en:Attack on Pearl Harbor|Attack on Pearl Harbor]] |[[Pacific War]] |[[:en:Atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki|Atomic bombings]] |[[Soviet–Japanese War]] |[[Surrender of Japan]] |[[Occupation of Japan]] |[[Postwar Japan]] |[[:en:Anpo protests|Anpo protests]] |[[Japanese economic miracle|Economic miracle]] |[[Japanese asset price bubble|Asset price bubble]]}} |1926–1989
|{{longitem |'''[[Heisei era|Heisei]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Lost Decades]] |[[Great Hanshin earthquake]] |[[Cool Japan]] |[[2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|Tōhoku earthquake]] |[[2019 Japanese imperial transition|Imperial transition]] }} }} |1989–2019

Please only include/edit it after discussion on the talk page.
|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD

|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |538–710 <!---------------------------------------------------------> |{{longitem |'''[[Nara period|Nara]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |710–794

|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Nanban trade]] |[[Japanese invasions of Korea (1592–1598)|Imjin War]] |[[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]]}} }} |1573–1603
|{{longitem |[[:en:Edo period|'''Edo''' {{small|(Tokugawa)}}]] {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Tokugawa shogunate]] |[[Invasion of Ryukyu]] |[[Siege of Osaka]] |[[Sakoku]] |[[Perry Expedition]] |[[:en:Convention of Kanagawa|Convention of Kanagawa]] |[[:en:Bakumatsu|Bakumatsu]] |[[Meiji Restoration]] |[[:en:Boshin War|Boshin War]]}} }} |1603–1868
|{{longitem |'''[[Meiji era|Meiji]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Ryūkyū Disposition]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1874)|Invasion of Taiwan (1874)]] |[[Satsuma Rebellion]] |[[:en:First Sino-Japanese War|First Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Shimonoseki]] |[[Triple Intervention]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Invasion of Taiwan (1895)]] |[[Taiwan under Japanese rule|Colonization of Taiwan]] |[[:en:Boxer Rebellion|Boxer Rebellion]] |[[Russo-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Portsmouth|Treaty of Portsmouth]] |[[Japan–Korea Treaty of 1910|Japan–Korea Treaty]] |[[Korea under Japanese rule|Colonization of Korea]]}} }} |1868–1912

|{{longitem |'''[[Heisei era|Heisei]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Lost Decades]] |[[:en:Great Hanshin earthquake|Great Hanshin earthquake]] |[[:en:Cool Japan|Cool Japan]] |[[2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|Tōhoku earthquake]] |[[2019 Japanese imperial transition|Imperial transition]] }} }} |1989–2019

<!-------------------------------- Periods ----------------------------------- Note: Events included in this list for a particular time period should be considered significant to Japan's overall history Insignificant events are discouraged. --> | list1name = periods | list1title = {{resize|110%|Periods}}<!--Resize here (rather than via styling) so accompanying [show/hide] link is not resized as well--> | list1 = {{aligned table|fullwidth=y|leftright=y|nowrap2=y |'''[[Japanese Paleolithic|Paleolithic]]''' |before 14,000 BC |'''[[Jōmon period|Jōmon]]''' |14,000–1000 BC<!-- ------ Note: The inclusion of the Yamato period below is a contentious issue. Please only include/edit it after discussion on the talk page.
|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Kofun period|Kofun]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |300–538 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |538–710 <!---------------------------------------------------------> |{{longitem |'''[[Nara period|Nara]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |710–794
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Heian period|Heian]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Former Nine Years' War|Former Nine Years' War]] |[[Later Three-Year War]] |[[:en:Genpei War|Genpei War]] }} }} |794–1185
|{{longitem |'''[[Kamakura period|Kamakura]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Jōkyū War]]| |[[Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions]]| |[[:en:Genkō War|Genkō War]]| |[[Kenmu Restoration]] }} }} |1185–1333
|{{longitem |'''[[Muromachi period|Muromachi]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Northern and Southern Courts period|Nanboku-chō period]] |[[Sengoku period]]}} }} |1336–1573
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Nanban trade]] |[[Japanese invasions of Korea (1592–1598)|Imjin War]] |[[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]]}} }} |1573–1603
|{{longitem |[[:en:Edo period|'''Edo''' {{small|(Tokugawa)}}]] {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Tokugawa shogunate]] |[[Invasion of Ryukyu]] |[[Siege of Osaka]] |[[Sakoku]] |[[Perry Expedition]] |[[:en:Convention of Kanagawa|Convention of Kanagawa]] |[[:en:Bakumatsu|Bakumatsu]] |[[Meiji Restoration]] |[[:en:Boshin War|Boshin War]]}} }} |1603–1868
|{{longitem |'''[[Meiji era|Meiji]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Ryūkyū Disposition]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1874)|Invasion of Taiwan (1874)]] |[[Satsuma Rebellion]] |[[:en:First Sino-Japanese War|First Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Shimonoseki]] |[[Triple Intervention]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Invasion of Taiwan (1895)]] |[[Taiwan under Japanese rule|Colonization of Taiwan]] |[[:en:Boxer Rebellion|Boxer Rebellion]] |[[Russo-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Portsmouth|Treaty of Portsmouth]] |[[Japan–Korea Treaty of 1910|Japan–Korea Treaty]] |[[Korea under Japanese rule|Colonization of Korea]]}} }} |1868–1912
|{{longitem |'''[[Taishō era|Taishō]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Japan during World War I|World War I]] |[[Japanese intervention in Siberia|Intervention in Siberia]] |[[1923 Great Kantō earthquake|Great Kantō earthquake]]}} }} |1912–1926
|'''[[Shōwa era|Shōwa]]''' {{ublist |class=wraplinks |style=padding-left:1.4em;text-align:left;line-height:1.25em;padding-bottom:0.2em; |[[Japanese militarism|Militarism]] |[[Shōwa financial crisis|Financial crisis]] |[[Nanking incident of 1927|Nanking incident]] |[[Mukden Incident]] |[[Japanese invasion of Manchuria|Invasion of Manchuria]] |[[May 15 incident]] |[[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] |[[Anti-Comintern Pact]] |[[Tripartite Pact]] |[[Second Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Japan during World War II|World War II]] |[[:en:Attack on Pearl Harbor|Attack on Pearl Harbor]] |[[Pacific War]] |[[:en:Atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki|Atomic bombings]] |[[Soviet–Japanese War]] |[[Surrender of Japan]] |[[Occupation of Japan]] |[[Postwar Japan]] |[[:en:Anpo protests|Anpo protests]] |[[Japanese economic miracle|Economic miracle]] |[[Japanese asset price bubble|Asset price bubble]]}} |1926–1989
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Heisei era|Heisei]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Lost Decades]] |[[:en:Great Hanshin earthquake|Great Hanshin earthquake]] |[[:en:Cool Japan|Cool Japan]] |[[2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|Tōhoku earthquake]] |[[2019 Japanese imperial transition|Imperial transition]] }} }} |1989–2019
|{{longitem |'''[[Reiwa era|Reiwa]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:COVID-19 pandemic in Japan|COVID-19 pandemic]] |[[:en:Assassination of Shinzo Abe|Abe assassination]] |[[2024 Noto earthquake|Noto earthquake]]}} }} |2019–present }}

| list2name = topics | list2title = {{resize|110%|Topics}}<!--(see above)--> | list2 = <!--Alphabetical:--> {{startflatlist}} * [[Capital punishment in Japan#History|Capital punishment]] * [[Japanese currency|Currency]] * [[List of earthquakes in Japan|Earthquakes]] * [[:en:Economic history of Japan|Economy]] * [[Japanese era name|Era names]] * [[History of education in Japan|Education]] * [[:en:Empire of Japan|Empire]] * [[History of Japanese foreign relations|Foreign relations]] * [[:en:Geography of Japan|Geography]] * [[:en:Historiography of Japan|Historiography]] * Religion ** [[History of Buddhism in Japan|Buddhism]] ** [[History of Christianity in Japan|Christianity]] ** [[History of Islam in Japan|Islam]] ** [[History of the Jews in Japan|Judaism]] ** [[History of Shinto|Shinto]] * [[Military history of Japan|Military]] * [[Naval history of Japan|Naval]] * [[Politics of Japan|Politics]] * [[Post-war Japan|Post-war]] * [[History of science and technology in Japan|Science and technology]] * [[History of sports in Japan|Sports]] * [[List of World Heritage Sites in Japan|World Heritage Sites]] {{endflatlist}}

}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

Please only include/edit it after discussion on the talk page.
|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Kofun period|Kofun]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |300–538 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |538–710 <!---------------------------------------------------------> |{{longitem |'''[[Nara period|Nara]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |710–794
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Heian period|Heian]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Former Nine Years' War|Former Nine Years' War]] |[[Later Three-Year War]] |[[:en:Genpei War|Genpei War]] }} }} |794–1185
|{{longitem |'''[[Kamakura period|Kamakura]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Jōkyū War]]| |[[Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions]]| |[[:en:Genkō War|Genkō War]]| |[[Kenmu Restoration]] }} }} |1185–1333
|{{longitem |'''[[Muromachi period|Muromachi]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Northern and Southern Courts period|Nanboku-chō period]] |[[Sengoku period]]}} }} |1336–1573
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Nanban trade]] |[[Japanese invasions of Korea (1592–1598)|Imjin War]] |[[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]]}} }} |1573–1603
|{{longitem |[[:en:Edo period|'''Edo''' {{small|(Tokugawa)}}]] {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Tokugawa shogunate]] |[[Invasion of Ryukyu]] |[[Siege of Osaka]] |[[Sakoku]] |[[Perry Expedition]] |[[:en:Convention of Kanagawa|Convention of Kanagawa]] |[[:en:Bakumatsu|Bakumatsu]] |[[Meiji Restoration]] |[[:en:Boshin War|Boshin War]]}} }} |1603–1868
|{{longitem |'''[[Meiji era|Meiji]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Ryūkyū Disposition]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1874)|Invasion of Taiwan (1874)]] |[[Satsuma Rebellion]] |[[:en:First Sino-Japanese War|First Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Shimonoseki]] |[[Triple Intervention]] |[[Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Invasion of Taiwan (1895)]] |[[Taiwan under Japanese rule|Colonization of Taiwan]] |[[:en:Boxer Rebellion|Boxer Rebellion]] |[[Russo-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Portsmouth|Treaty of Portsmouth]] |[[Japan–Korea Treaty of 1910|Japan–Korea Treaty]] |[[Korea under Japanese rule|Colonization of Korea]]}} }} |1868–1912
|{{longitem |'''[[Taishō era|Taishō]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Japan during World War I|World War I]] |[[Japanese intervention in Siberia|Intervention in Siberia]] |[[:en:1923 Great Kantō earthquake|Great Kantō earthquake]]}} }} |1912–1926
|'''[[Shōwa era|Shōwa]]''' {{ublist |class=wraplinks |style=padding-left:1.4em;text-align:left;line-height:1.25em;padding-bottom:0.2em; |[[Japanese militarism|Militarism]] |[[Shōwa financial crisis|Financial crisis]] |[[Nanking incident of 1927|Nanking incident]] |[[Mukden Incident]] |[[Japanese invasion of Manchuria|Invasion of Manchuria]] |[[May 15 incident]] |[[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] |[[Anti-Comintern Pact]] |[[Tripartite Pact]] |[[Second Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Japan during World War II|World War II]] |[[:en:Attack on Pearl Harbor|Attack on Pearl Harbor]] |[[Pacific War]] |[[:en:Atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki|Atomic bombings]] |[[Soviet–Japanese War]] |[[Surrender of Japan]] |[[Occupation of Japan]] |[[Postwar Japan]] |[[:en:Anpo protests|Anpo protests]] |[[Japanese economic miracle|Economic miracle]] |[[Japanese asset price bubble|Asset price bubble]]}} |1926–1989
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Heisei era|Heisei]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Lost Decades]] |[[:en:Great Hanshin earthquake|Great Hanshin earthquake]] |[[:en:Cool Japan|Cool Japan]] |[[:en:2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|Tōhoku earthquake]] |[[:en:2019 Japanese imperial transition|Imperial transition]] }} }} |1989–2019
|{{longitem |'''[[Reiwa era|Reiwa]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:COVID-19 pandemic in Japan|COVID-19 pandemic]] |[[:en:Assassination of Shinzo Abe|Abe assassination]] |[[2024 Noto earthquake|Noto earthquake]]}} }} |2019–present }}

Please only include/edit it after discussion on the talk page.
|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD

|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |538–710 <!---------------------------------------------------------> |{{longitem |'''[[Nara period|Nara]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |710–794

Please only include/edit it after discussion on the talk page.
|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Kofun period|Kofun]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |300–538 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |538–710 <!---------------------------------------------------------> |{{longitem |'''[[Nara period|Nara]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |710–794

|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Jōkyū War|Jōkyū War]]| |[[Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions]]| |[[:en:Genkō War|Genkō War]]| |[[Kenmu Restoration]] }} }} |1185–1333

|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Nanban trade]] |[[:en:Japanese invasions of Korea (1592–1598)|Imjin War]] |[[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]]}} }} |1573–1603

|{{longitem |'''[[Meiji era|Meiji]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Ryūkyū Disposition]] |[[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1874)|Invasion of Taiwan (1874)]] |[[Satsuma Rebellion]] |[[:en:First Sino-Japanese War|First Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Shimonoseki]] |[[Triple Intervention]] |[[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Invasion of Taiwan (1895)]] |[[Taiwan under Japanese rule|Colonization of Taiwan]] |[[:en:Boxer Rebellion|Boxer Rebellion]] |[[Russo-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Portsmouth|Treaty of Portsmouth]] |[[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1910|Japan–Korea Treaty]] |[[Korea under Japanese rule|Colonization of Korea]]}} }} |1868–1912
|{{longitem |'''[[Taishō era|Taishō]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Japan during World War I|World War I]] |[[Japanese intervention in Siberia|Intervention in Siberia]] |[[:en:1923 Great Kantō earthquake|Great Kantō earthquake]]}} }} |1912–1926

|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Heisei era|Heisei]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Lost Decades]] |[[:en:Great Hanshin earthquake|Great Hanshin earthquake]] |[[:en:Cool Japan|Cool Japan]] |[[:en:2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|Tōhoku earthquake]] |[[:en:2019 Japanese imperial transition|Imperial transition]] }} }} |1989–2019

<!-------------------------------- Periods ----------------------------------- Note: Events included in this list for a particular time period should be considered significant to Japan's overall history Insignificant events are discouraged. --> | list1name = periods | list1title = {{resize|110%|Periods}}<!--Resize here (rather than via styling) so accompanying [show/hide] link is not resized as well--> | list1 = {{aligned table|fullwidth=y|leftright=y|nowrap2=y |'''[[:en:Japanese Paleolithic|Paleolithic]]''' |before 14,000 BC |'''[[Jōmon period|Jōmon]]''' |14,000–1000 BC<!-- ------ Note: The inclusion of the Yamato period below is a contentious issue. Please only include/edit it after discussion on the talk page.
|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Kofun period|Kofun]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |300–538 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |538–710 <!---------------------------------------------------------> |{{longitem |'''[[Nara period|Nara]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |710–794
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Heian period|Heian]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Former Nine Years' War|Former Nine Years' War]] |[[Later Three-Year War]] |[[:en:Genpei War|Genpei War]] }} }} |794–1185
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Jōkyū War|Jōkyū War]]| |[[Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions]]| |[[:en:Genkō War|Genkō War]]| |[[Kenmu Restoration]] }} }} |1185–1333
|{{longitem |'''[[Muromachi period|Muromachi]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Northern and Southern Courts period|Nanboku-chō period]] |[[Sengoku period]]}} }} |1336–1573
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Nanban trade]] |[[:en:Japanese invasions of Korea (1592–1598)|Imjin War]] |[[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]]}} }} |1573–1603
|{{longitem |[[:en:Edo period|'''Edo''' {{small|(Tokugawa)}}]] {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Tokugawa shogunate]] |[[Invasion of Ryukyu]] |[[Siege of Osaka]] |[[Sakoku]] |[[Perry Expedition]] |[[:en:Convention of Kanagawa|Convention of Kanagawa]] |[[:en:Bakumatsu|Bakumatsu]] |[[Meiji Restoration]] |[[:en:Boshin War|Boshin War]]}} }} |1603–1868
|{{longitem |'''[[Meiji era|Meiji]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Ryūkyū Disposition]] |[[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1874)|Invasion of Taiwan (1874)]] |[[Satsuma Rebellion]] |[[:en:First Sino-Japanese War|First Sino-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Shimonoseki]] |[[Triple Intervention]] |[[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Invasion of Taiwan (1895)]] |[[Taiwan under Japanese rule|Colonization of Taiwan]] |[[:en:Boxer Rebellion|Boxer Rebellion]] |[[Russo-Japanese War]] |[[Treaty of Portsmouth|Treaty of Portsmouth]] |[[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1910|Japan–Korea Treaty]] |[[Korea under Japanese rule|Colonization of Korea]]}} }} |1868–1912
|{{longitem |'''[[Taishō era|Taishō]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Japan during World War I|World War I]] |[[:en:Japanese intervention in Siberia|Intervention in Siberia]] |[[:en:1923 Great Kantō earthquake|Great Kantō earthquake]]}} }} |1912–1926
|'''[[Shōwa era|Shōwa]]''' {{ublist |class=wraplinks |style=padding-left:1.4em;text-align:left;line-height:1.25em;padding-bottom:0.2em; |[[:en:Japanese militarism|Militarism]] |[[Shōwa financial crisis|Financial crisis]] |[[Nanking incident of 1927|Nanking incident]] |[[Mukden Incident]] |[[:en:Japanese invasion of Manchuria|Invasion of Manchuria]] |[[May 15 incident]] |[[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] |[[:en:Anti-Comintern Pact|Anti-Comintern Pact]] |[[Tripartite Pact]] |[[Second Sino-Japanese War]] |[[:en:Japan during World War II|World War II]] |[[:en:Attack on Pearl Harbor|Attack on Pearl Harbor]] |[[Pacific War]] |[[:en:Atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki|Atomic bombings]] |[[Soviet–Japanese War]] |[[Surrender of Japan]] |[[Occupation of Japan]] |[[Postwar Japan]] |[[:en:Anpo protests|Anpo protests]] |[[:en:Japanese economic miracle|Economic miracle]] |[[:en:Japanese asset price bubble|Asset price bubble]]}} |1926–1989
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Heisei era|Heisei]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Lost Decades]] |[[:en:Great Hanshin earthquake|Great Hanshin earthquake]] |[[:en:Cool Japan|Cool Japan]] |[[:en:2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|Tōhoku earthquake]] |[[:en:2019 Japanese imperial transition|Imperial transition]] }} }} |1989–2019
|{{longitem |'''[[Reiwa era|Reiwa]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:COVID-19 pandemic in Japan|COVID-19 pandemic]] |[[:en:Assassination of Shinzo Abe|Abe assassination]] |[[:en:2024 Noto earthquake|Noto earthquake]]}} }} |2019–present }}
<!--------------------------------- Topics ------------------------------------>
| list2name = topics | list2title = {{resize|110%|Topics}}<!--(see above)--> | list2 = <!--Alphabetical:--> {{startflatlist}} * [[Capital punishment in Japan#History|Capital punishment]] * [[:en:Japanese currency|Currency]] * [[List of earthquakes in Japan|Earthquakes]] * [[:en:Economic history of Japan|Economy]] * [[:en:Japanese era name|Era names]] * [[:en:History of education in Japan|Education]] * [[:en:Empire of Japan|Empire]] * [[:en:History of Japanese foreign relations|Foreign relations]] * [[:en:Geography of Japan|Geography]] * [[:en:Historiography of Japan|Historiography]] * Religion ** [[:en:History of Buddhism in Japan|Buddhism]] ** [[:en:History of Christianity in Japan|Christianity]] ** [[:en:History of Islam in Japan|Islam]] ** [[:en:History of the Jews in Japan|Judaism]] ** [[:en:History of Shinto|Shinto]] * [[Military history of Japan|Military]] * [[Naval history of Japan|Naval]] * [[Politics of Japan|Politics]] * [[Post-war Japan|Post-war]] * [[:en:History of science and technology in Japan|Science and technology]] * [[:en:History of sports in Japan|Sports]] * [[:en:List of World Heritage Sites in Japan|World Heritage Sites]] {{endflatlist}}
<!--------------------------------- below -------------------------------------> | belowclass = hlist | below = * [[:en:Glossary of Japanese history|Glossary]] * [[:en:History of Japan|History]] * [[Timeline of Japanese history|Timeline]]
}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

Please only include/edit it after discussion on the talk page.
|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD

|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |538–710 <!---------------------------------------------------------> |{{longitem |'''[[:en:Nara period|Nara]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |710–794
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Heian period|Heian]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Former Nine Years' War|Former Nine Years' War]] |[[:en:Later Three-Year War|Later Three-Year War]] |[[:en:Genpei War|Genpei War]] }} }} |794–1185

|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD

|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD

Please only include/edit it after discussion on the talk page.
|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Kofun period|Kofun]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |300–538 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |538–710 <!---------------------------------------------------------> |{{longitem |'''[[:en:Nara period|Nara]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |710–794
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Heian period|Heian]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Former Nine Years' War|Former Nine Years' War]] |[[:en:Later Three-Year War|Later Three-Year War]] |[[:en:Genpei War|Genpei War]] }} }} |794–1185
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Jōkyū War|Jōkyū War]]| |[[:en:Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions]]| |[[:en:Genkō War|Genkō War]]| |[[Kenmu Restoration]] }} }} |1185–1333

|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Nanban trade|Nanban trade]] |[[:en:Japanese invasions of Korea (1592–1598)|Imjin War]] |[[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]]}} }} |1573–1603
