<!-------------------------------- Periods ----------------------------------- Note: Events included in this list for a particular time period should be considered significant to Japan's overall history Insignificant events are discouraged. --> | list1name = periods | list1title = {{resize|110%|Periods}}<!--Resize here (rather than via styling) so accompanying [show/hide] link is not resized as well--> | list1 = {{aligned table|fullwidth=y|leftright=y|nowrap2=y |'''[[:en:Japanese Paleolithic|Paleolithic]]''' |before 14,000 BC |'''[[Jōmon period|Jōmon]]''' |14,000–1000 BC<!-- ------ Note: The inclusion of the Yamato period below is a contentious issue. Please only include/edit it after discussion on the talk page.
|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[:en:Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Kofun period|Kofun]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |300–538 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |538–710 <!---------------------------------------------------------> |{{longitem |'''[[:en:Nara period|Nara]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |710–794
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Heian period|Heian]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Former Nine Years' War|Former Nine Years' War]] |[[:en:Later Three-Year War|Later Three-Year War]] |[[:en:Genpei War|Genpei War]] }} }} |794–1185
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Jōkyū War|Jōkyū War]]| |[[:en:Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions]]| |[[:en:Genkō War|Genkō War]]| |[[Kenmu Restoration]] }} }} |1185–1333
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Muromachi period|Muromachi]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Northern and Southern Courts period|Nanboku-chō period]] |[[:en:Sengoku period|Sengoku period]]}} }} |1336–1573
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Nanban trade|Nanban trade]] |[[:en:Japanese invasions of Korea (1592–1598)|Imjin War]] |[[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]]}} }} |1573–1603
|{{longitem |[[:en:Edo period|'''Edo''' {{small|(Tokugawa)}}]] {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Tokugawa shogunate]] |[[Invasion of Ryukyu]] |[[:en:Siege of Osaka|Siege of Osaka]] |[[:en:Sakoku|Sakoku]] |[[:en:Perry Expedition|Perry Expedition]] |[[:en:Convention of Kanagawa|Convention of Kanagawa]] |[[:en:Bakumatsu|Bakumatsu]] |[[Meiji Restoration]] |[[:en:Boshin War|Boshin War]]}} }} |1603–1868
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Ryūkyū Disposition|Ryūkyū Disposition]] |[[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1874)|Invasion of Taiwan (1874)]] |[[:en:Satsuma Rebellion|Satsuma Rebellion]] |[[:en:First Sino-Japanese War|First Sino-Japanese War]] |[[:en:Treaty of Shimonoseki|Treaty of Shimonoseki]] |[[:en:Triple Intervention|Triple Intervention]] |[[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Invasion of Taiwan (1895)]] |[[:en:Taiwan under Japanese rule|Colonization of Taiwan]] |[[:en:Boxer Rebellion|Boxer Rebellion]] |[[:en:Russo-Japanese War|Russo-Japanese War]] |[[:en:Treaty of Portsmouth|Treaty of Portsmouth]] |[[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1910|Japan–Korea Treaty]] |[[:en:Korea under Japanese rule|Colonization of Korea]]}} }} |1868–1912
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Taishō era|Taishō]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Japan during World War I|World War I]] |[[:en:Japanese intervention in Siberia|Intervention in Siberia]] |[[:en:1923 Great Kantō earthquake|Great Kantō earthquake]]}} }} |1912–1926
|'''[[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]]''' {{ublist |class=wraplinks |style=padding-left:1.4em;text-align:left;line-height:1.25em;padding-bottom:0.2em; |[[:en:Japanese militarism|Militarism]] |[[:en:Shōwa financial crisis|Financial crisis]] |[[:en:Nanking incident of 1927|Nanking incident]] |[[:en:Mukden Incident|Mukden Incident]] |[[:en:Japanese invasion of Manchuria|Invasion of Manchuria]] |[[:en:May 15 incident|May 15 incident]] |[[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] |[[:en:Anti-Comintern Pact|Anti-Comintern Pact]] |[[:en:Tripartite Pact|Tripartite Pact]] |[[:en:Second Sino-Japanese War|Second Sino-Japanese War]] |[[:en:Japan during World War II|World War II]] |[[:en:Attack on Pearl Harbor|Attack on Pearl Harbor]] |[[:en:Pacific War|Pacific War]] |[[:en:Atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki|Atomic bombings]] |[[:en:Soviet–Japanese War|Soviet–Japanese War]] |[[:en:Surrender of Japan|Surrender of Japan]] |[[:en:Occupation of Japan|Occupation of Japan]] |[[:en:Postwar Japan|Postwar Japan]] |[[:en:Anpo protests|Anpo protests]] |[[:en:Japanese economic miracle|Economic miracle]] |[[:en:Japanese asset price bubble|Asset price bubble]]}} |1926–1989
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Heisei era|Heisei]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Lost Decades|Lost Decades]] |[[:en:Great Hanshin earthquake|Great Hanshin earthquake]] |[[:en:Cool Japan|Cool Japan]] |[[:en:2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|Tōhoku earthquake]] |[[:en:2019 Japanese imperial transition|Imperial transition]] }} }} |1989–2019
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Reiwa era|Reiwa]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:COVID-19 pandemic in Japan|COVID-19 pandemic]] |[[:en:Assassination of Shinzo Abe|Abe assassination]] |[[:en:2024 Noto earthquake|Noto earthquake]]}} }} |2019–present }}
<!--------------------------------- Topics ------------------------------------>
| list2name = topics | list2title = {{resize|110%|Topics}}<!--(see above)--> | list2 = <!--Alphabetical:--> {{startflatlist}} * [[Capital punishment in Japan#History|Capital punishment]] * [[:en:Japanese currency|Currency]] * [[:en:List of earthquakes in Japan|Earthquakes]] * [[:en:Economic history of Japan|Economy]] * [[:en:Japanese era name|Era names]] * [[:en:History of education in Japan|Education]] * [[:en:Empire of Japan|Empire]] * [[:en:History of Japanese foreign relations|Foreign relations]] * [[:en:Geography of Japan|Geography]] * [[:en:Historiography of Japan|Historiography]] * Religion ** [[:en:History of Buddhism in Japan|Buddhism]] ** [[:en:History of Christianity in Japan|Christianity]] ** [[:en:History of Islam in Japan|Islam]] ** [[:en:History of the Jews in Japan|Judaism]] ** [[:en:History of Shinto|Shinto]] * [[:en:Military history of Japan|Military]] * [[:en:Naval history of Japan|Naval]] * [[:en:Politics of Japan|Politics]] * [[:en:Post-war Japan|Post-war]] * [[:en:History of science and technology in Japan|Science and technology]] * [[:en:History of sports in Japan|Sports]] * [[:en:List of World Heritage Sites in Japan|World Heritage Sites]] {{endflatlist}} <!--------------------------------- below -------------------------------------> | belowclass = hlist | below = * [[:en:Glossary of Japanese history|Glossary]] * [[:en:History of Japan|History]] * [[:en:Timeline of Japanese history|Timeline]] }}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

<includeonly>{{Sidebar with collapsible lists | templatestyles = History of Japan/styles.css | class = history-of-japan | name = History of Japan | centered list titles = y | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:History of Japan|a series]] on the | title = [[:en:History of Japan|History of Japan]] <!--Default image should fit for most of Japan's history, including pages of pre-Meiji periods--> | image = {{#invoke:InfoboxImage|InfoboxImage |image={{{image|KaiIchiranzu1806.jpg}}} |size={{{imagesize|250px}}} }} | caption = {{{caption|}}} | expanded = {{{expanded|{{{selected|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
<!-------------------------------- Periods ----------------------------------- Note: Events included in this list for a particular time period should be considered significant to Japan's overall history Insignificant events are discouraged. --> | list1name = periods | list1title = {{resize|110%|Periods}}<!--Resize here (rather than via styling) so accompanying [show/hide] link is not resized as well--> | list1 = {{aligned table|fullwidth=y|leftright=y|nowrap2=y |'''[[:en:Japanese Paleolithic|Paleolithic]]''' |before 14,000 BC |'''[[Jōmon period|Jōmon]]''' |14,000–1000 BC<!-- ------ Note: The inclusion of the Yamato period below is a contentious issue. Please only include/edit it after discussion on the talk page.
|'''[[Yamato period|Yamato]]''' |250–710 |{{pad|2em}}[[Kofun period|Kofun]] |''250–538'' |{{pad|2em}}[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]] |''538–710'' }} ------- --><!---If Yamato section above used, remove the following:---> |{{longitem |'''[[:en:Yayoi period|Yayoi]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |1000 BC – 300 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[Kofun period|Kofun]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |300–538 AD
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Asuka period|Asuka]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |538–710 <!---------------------------------------------------------> |{{longitem |'''[[:en:Nara period|Nara]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; }} }} |710–794
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Heian period|Heian]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Former Nine Years' War|Former Nine Years' War]] |[[:en:Later Three-Year War|Later Three-Year War]] |[[:en:Genpei War|Genpei War]] }} }} |794–1185
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Kamakura period|Kamakura]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Jōkyū War|Jōkyū War]]| |[[:en:Mongol invasions of Japan|Mongol invasions]]| |[[:en:Genkō War|Genkō War]]| |[[Kenmu Restoration]] }} }} |1185–1333
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Muromachi period|Muromachi]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Northern and Southern Courts period|Nanboku-chō period]] |[[:en:Sengoku period|Sengoku period]]}} }} |1336–1573
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Azuchi–Momoyama period|Azuchi–Momoyama]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Nanban trade|Nanban trade]] |[[:en:Japanese invasions of Korea (1592–1598)|Imjin War]] |[[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Battle of Sekigahara]]}} }} |1573–1603
|{{longitem |[[:en:Edo period|'''Edo''' {{small|(Tokugawa)}}]] {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[Tokugawa shogunate]] |[[Invasion of Ryukyu]] |[[:en:Siege of Osaka|Siege of Osaka]] |[[:en:Sakoku|Sakoku]] |[[:en:Perry Expedition|Perry Expedition]] |[[:en:Convention of Kanagawa|Convention of Kanagawa]] |[[:en:Bakumatsu|Bakumatsu]] |[[Meiji Restoration]] |[[:en:Boshin War|Boshin War]]}} }} |1603–1868
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Meiji era|Meiji]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Ryūkyū Disposition|Ryūkyū Disposition]] |[[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1874)|Invasion of Taiwan (1874)]] |[[:en:Satsuma Rebellion|Satsuma Rebellion]] |[[:en:First Sino-Japanese War|First Sino-Japanese War]] |[[:en:Treaty of Shimonoseki|Treaty of Shimonoseki]] |[[:en:Triple Intervention|Triple Intervention]] |[[:en:Japanese invasion of Taiwan (1895)|Invasion of Taiwan (1895)]] |[[:en:Taiwan under Japanese rule|Colonization of Taiwan]] |[[:en:Boxer Rebellion|Boxer Rebellion]] |[[:en:Russo-Japanese War|Russo-Japanese War]] |[[:en:Treaty of Portsmouth|Treaty of Portsmouth]] |[[:en:Japan–Korea Treaty of 1910|Japan–Korea Treaty]] |[[:en:Korea under Japanese rule|Colonization of Korea]]}} }} |1868–1912
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Taishō era|Taishō]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Japan during World War I|World War I]] |[[:en:Japanese intervention in Siberia|Intervention in Siberia]] |[[:en:1923 Great Kantō earthquake|Great Kantō earthquake]]}} }} |1912–1926
|'''[[:en:Shōwa era|Shōwa]]''' {{ublist |class=wraplinks |style=padding-left:1.4em;text-align:left;line-height:1.25em;padding-bottom:0.2em; |[[:en:Japanese militarism|Militarism]] |[[:en:Shōwa financial crisis|Financial crisis]] |[[:en:Nanking incident of 1927|Nanking incident]] |[[:en:Mukden Incident|Mukden Incident]] |[[:en:Japanese invasion of Manchuria|Invasion of Manchuria]] |[[:en:May 15 incident|May 15 incident]] |[[:en:February 26 incident|February 26 incident]] |[[:en:Anti-Comintern Pact|Anti-Comintern Pact]] |[[:en:Tripartite Pact|Tripartite Pact]] |[[:en:Second Sino-Japanese War|Second Sino-Japanese War]] |[[:en:Japan during World War II|World War II]] |[[:en:Attack on Pearl Harbor|Attack on Pearl Harbor]] |[[:en:Pacific War|Pacific War]] |[[:en:Atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki|Atomic bombings]] |[[:en:Soviet–Japanese War|Soviet–Japanese War]] |[[:en:Surrender of Japan|Surrender of Japan]] |[[:en:Occupation of Japan|Occupation of Japan]] |[[:en:Postwar Japan|Postwar Japan]] |[[:en:Anpo protests|Anpo protests]] |[[:en:Japanese economic miracle|Economic miracle]] |[[:en:Japanese asset price bubble|Asset price bubble]]}} |1926–1989
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Heisei era|Heisei]]''' {{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:Lost Decades|Lost Decades]] |[[:en:Great Hanshin earthquake|Great Hanshin earthquake]] |[[:en:Cool Japan|Cool Japan]] |[[:en:2011 Tōhoku earthquake and tsunami|Tōhoku earthquake]] |[[:en:2019 Japanese imperial transition|Imperial transition]] }} }} |1989–2019
|{{longitem |'''[[:en:Reiwa era|Reiwa]]'''{{ublist|style=padding-left:1.4em;line-height:1.4em; |[[:en:COVID-19 pandemic in Japan|COVID-19 pandemic]] |[[:en:Assassination of Shinzo Abe|Abe assassination]] |[[:en:2024 Noto earthquake|Noto earthquake]]}} }} |2019–present }}
